EPSS 0.07% exploitation probability (30-day forecast). MITRE ATT&CK mapped: T1078, T1190, T1203 (3 techniques). 1 indicator detected - upgrade to Pro for full IOC access. Actor attribution: CDB-UNATTR-CVE. AI confidence: HIGH (78%) - strong data corroboration.
apex_ai.recommended_action: IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED - CISA KEV confirmed. Apply vendor patch within 24 hours. Isolate affected systems. Enable enhanced logging.

paywall.message: Upgrade to Pro for full kill chain analysis, actor attribution, and 30-day threat forecast.
